name: Selma Bajrami
description:
'''Selma Bajrami''' ({{IPA|bs|sɛlma bǎjrami|pron}}; born 4 July 1980) is a [[Bosnia and Herzegovina|Bosnian]] singer. She began her professional music career at the age of 18 with the release of her debut studio album ''[[Kad suza ne bude...]]'' (1998). She is regarded as one of the most prominent popular music performers from [[Bosnia and Herzegovina]] and is known for her versatility across genres, strong vocal delivery, and energetic, dance-oriented live performances.

To date, Bajrami has released nine studio albums and is best known for hit songs such as “Kakvo tijelo Selma ima” (2004), “Tijelo uz tijelo” (2004), “Ostrvo tuge” (2007), “Lijepe žene” (2007), and “Farmerice” (2009).
